name: Abhilash Mishra
testimonial:
Everybody wants an agency that gets results. Fewer want one that tells them they’re wrong. 
Abhirup did both for Ambee. He flagged our US marketing plan before we could execute it wrong. Clearly. With reasons. Then helped us build something that actually worked.
He’s not a vendor. He’s the guy who warns you, explains why, and then delivers anyway.

name: Francis Xavier
testimonial:
Abhirup bring a very go-to-person attitude at work, plays very well between your challenges and how we could turn them around. 
Has sound knowledge and often comes about with interesting ways to build into your seo. Would recommend working with him.

name: Murugappan Meiyappan
testimonial:
GTXO Consulting were true partners in helping Shopflo crack and scale a new advertising channel. 

When we hit an early roadblock, Abhirup worked closely with our team, went beyond scope, and helped solve deeper marketing challenges that were blocking performance. 

I’d highly recommend him and his team for innovative marketing experiments. He won’t act like a vendor. He’ll challenge you, disagree when needed, and stay committed to your goals.

name: Tushar Guneja
testimonial:
Finding a marketing professional who can run campaigns is easy. But finding someone who truly understands your business model, expectations, and product positioning is rare. You need someone who not only executes but also guides you on defining the right target audience and refining your product approach.

I’ve worked with Abhirup, and he is exactly that kind of marketer, someone who aligns marketing strategies with business growth and ensures every effort contributes to long-term success.

name: Aravind Sanal
testimonial:
Abhirup as an 'all-rounder' growth marketer. He has been a reliable partner in delivering many successful projects at Savittr. 
His knowledge and expertise in SEO, paid acquisition and account based marketing has consistently driven strong results for us. I'm extremely happy to have Abhi as an embedded consultant at Savittr.

name: Swapnil Sinha
testimonial:
Abhirup proved to be an exceptional partner for our GTM initiatives. His expertise in executing our paid marketing experiments accelerated our testing cycles significantly. 
Through his partnership, we were able to generate a substantial sales-qualified pipeline in a short time frame
